scenario_description: The user first asks to copy Revenue to Sheet2, then asks to add a percentage column.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me copy the Revenue column to Sheet2
Sheet2 has data now. Add a 'Percentage' column next to Revenue that calculates each row's share of the total Revenue, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl = pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/NetIncome.xlsx'); ok = 'Sheet2' in xl.sheet_names; df2 = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/NetIncome.xlsx', sheet_name='Sheet2') if ok else None; has_col = ok and df2 is not None and any('percent' in str(c).lower() or 'ratio' in str(c).lower() for c in df2.columns); print('PASSED' if has_col else 'FAILED')"
